title: 11 Herbal Creams For Menopause
description: Curcuma longa creams contains the active constituents curcumin and demethoxycurcumin, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These properties can help reduce hot flashes and night sweats that often accompany menopause. Curcumin's ability to block prostaglandins, hormone-like substances that stimulate hot flashes, makes it an effective remedy for this symptom. Additionally, demethoxycurcumin helps regulate estrogen levels, which can become imbalanced during menopause, ...
